name: teste-qa-estapar
description: Automação de testes E2E com Cypress

scripts.clean:reports: if exist cypress\reports rd /s /q cypress\reports && if exist cypress\videos rd /s /q cypress\videos && if exist cypress\screenshots rd /s /q cypress\screenshots
scripts.test: npm run clean:reports && npm run cypress:run:headless && npm run report:merge && npm run report:generate
